---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or a new module for KnightOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm frustrated when I can't read files because there is no FS module").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how you envision its integration (e.g., "Implement a simple Read-Only FAT12 filesystem in a new `fs` module").

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've thought of.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, pseudocode, or architectural thoughts about the feature request here.
